Package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request

Class GenerateContentRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request.GenerateContentRequest
  • public class GenerateContentRequest
extends Object
    Request to generate a completion from the model.
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Method Detail

      • builder

        public static GenerateContentRequest.GenerateContentRequestBuilder builder()

      • toBuilder

        public GenerateContentRequest.GenerateContentRequestBuilder toBuilder()

      • getModel

        public String getModel()
        Required. The name of the Model to use for generating the completion.

        Format: `name=models/{model}`.

      • getContents

        public List<Content> getContents()
        Required. The content of the current conversation with the model.

        For single-turn queries, this is a single instance. For multi-turn queries, this is a repeated field that contains conversation history + the latest request.

      • getTools

        public List<Tool> getTools()
        Optional. A list of Tools the model may use to generate the next response.

        A Tool is a piece of code that enables the system to interact with external systems to perform an action, or set of actions, outside knowledge and scope of the model. The only supported tool is currently Function.

      • getToolConfig

        public ToolConfig getToolConfig()
        Optional. Tool configuration for any Tool specified in the request.

      • getSafetySettings

        public List<SafetySetting> getSafetySettings()
        Optional. A list of unique SafetySetting instances for blocking unsafe content.

        This will be enforced on the GenerateContentRequest.contents and GenerateContentResponse.candidates. There should not be more than one setting for each SafetyCategory type. The API will block any contents and responses that fail to meet the thresholds set by these settings. This list overrides the default settings for each SafetyCategory specified in the safetySettings. If there is no SafetySetting for a given SafetyCategory provided in the list, the API will use the default safety setting for that category. Harm categories HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH, HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT, HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT are supported.

      • getSystemInstruction

        public Content getSystemInstruction()
        Optional. Developer set system instruction. Currently, text only.

      • getGenerationConfig

        public GenerationConfig getGenerationConfig()
        Optional. Configuration options for model generation and outputs.

      • getCachedContent

        public String getCachedContent()
        Optional. The name of the cached content used as context to serve the prediction. Note: only used in explicit caching, where users can have control over caching (e.g., what content to cache) and enjoy guaranteed cost savings. Format: `cachedContents/{cachedContent}`

      • setModel

        public GenerateContentRequest setModel​(String model)
        Required. The name of the Model to use for generating the completion.

        Format: `name=models/{model}`.

        Returns:
        this.

      • setContents

        public GenerateContentRequest setContents​(List<Content> contents)
        Required. The content of the current conversation with the model.

        For single-turn queries, this is a single instance. For multi-turn queries, this is a repeated field that contains conversation history + the latest request.

        Returns:
        this.

      • setTools

        public GenerateContentRequest setTools​(List<Tool> tools)
        Optional. A list of Tools the model may use to generate the next response.

        A Tool is a piece of code that enables the system to interact with external systems to perform an action, or set of actions, outside knowledge and scope of the model. The only supported tool is currently Function.

        Returns:
        this.

      • setToolConfig

        public GenerateContentRequest setToolConfig​(ToolConfig toolConfig)
        Optional. Tool configuration for any Tool specified in the request.
        Returns:
        this.

      • setSafetySettings

        public GenerateContentRequest setSafetySettings​(List<SafetySetting> safetySettings)
        Optional. A list of unique SafetySetting instances for blocking unsafe content.

        This will be enforced on the GenerateContentRequest.contents and GenerateContentResponse.candidates. There should not be more than one setting for each SafetyCategory type. The API will block any contents and responses that fail to meet the thresholds set by these settings. This list overrides the default settings for each SafetyCategory specified in the safetySettings. If there is no SafetySetting for a given SafetyCategory provided in the list, the API will use the default safety setting for that category. Harm categories HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH, HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT, HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT are supported.

        Returns:
        this.

      • setSystemInstruction

        public GenerateContentRequest setSystemInstruction​(Content systemInstruction)
        Optional. Developer set system instruction. Currently, text only.
        Returns:
        this.

      • setGenerationConfig

        public GenerateContentRequest setGenerationConfig​(GenerationConfig generationConfig)
        Optional. Configuration options for model generation and outputs.
        Returns:
        this.

      • setCachedContent

        public GenerateContentRequest setCachedContent​(String cachedContent)
        Optional. The name of the cached content used as context to serve the prediction. Note: only used in explicit caching, where users can have control over caching (e.g., what content to cache) and enjoy guaranteed cost savings. Format: `cachedContents/{cachedContent}`
        Returns:
        this.
